title: FA: Player × HMI Patches
description: This resourcepack fixes Hold My Items and Fresh Animations: Player Extension compatibility problems.
body:
# What is this? **FA: Player × HMI Patches** fixes a compatibility issue between **[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)** and **[FA: Player Extension](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fa-player-extension)** which brings some questionable positions where items are held. The problem arises from **FA: Player Extension** modifying the First Person Hand Animations which affects the **Hold My Items** hand too. The fix simply disables the animations made by **FA: Player Extension** so that it'll not affect the **Hold My Item**'s First Person Hand.
--- # Installation The Installation is as simple as downloading the resourcepack and placing it over the **Fresh Animations: Player Extension pack** ## Resourcepack should be in this order ![Pack Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/480e7dd9b5d0240f428e1037847e404f42eae5a9.png) --- # Preview ![Difference](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2cfd5bc98d86dddbcb3cde7354d85927774fcc5f_0.webp) --- # Credits | Name | Remarks | | --- | --- | | [1045xtz](https://modrinth.com/user/1045xtz) | A short dude who made this patch :3 | | [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) | Creator of Fresh Animations. |
